channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Dead as Disco is easily one of the best indie games I’ve ever played — and after 20 hours of demo, it beats the ‘brilliant’ Hi-Fi Rush in one major way
item.description: Dead as Disco is an incredibly promising beat 'em up game, and after 20 hours of playtime in the demo, I'm convinced it'll be an instant hit.

item.title: J’ai testé la Polar Street X : une montre de trail urbain taillée ni pour l’aventure, ni pour la ville
item.description: Avec la Polar Street X, le constructeur finlandais souhaite séduire les coureurs sur route qui veulent partir à l'aventure en ville. Mais au-delà de la promesse marketing, est-ce que la montre de sport suit ? C'est ce qu'on va voir dans ce test complet.

item.title: Sorry Apple, the iPhone 17e is slick but the OnePlus 15R is a bigger bargain
item.description: The iPhone 17e is Apple's most compelling mid-range phone yet, but it's still leagues behind Android rivals like the OnePlus 15R.

item.title: Score $200 off this pre-built gaming PC with an RTX 5060 and 32GB of DDR5 RAM at Best Buy
item.description: It's a great price for a mid-range desktop for gaming at 1080p

item.title: Cet appareil photo hybride avec viseur OLED pouvant filmer en 5,7K profite d’une double réduction pour 720 € d’économies
item.description: Cet appareil photo, c'est le Panasonic Lumix G9 II, un boîtier nu hybride Micro 4/3 haut de gamme aussi bon en photo qu'en vidéo, à retrouver à 1 179,20 euros (après ODR) au lieu de 1 899 euros à sa sortie.

item.title: Lepow TriScreen Pro review: This 27in 4K monitor with dual detachable 16in side screens is a space-saver for your desk
item.description: Stuck for desk space but still want a triple monitor solution? I think I’ve found the solution

item.title: How to watch Atletico Madrid vs. Real Sociedad in the Copa del Rey final online for free
item.description: How to watch Copa del Rey final for free. Live stream Atletico Madrid vs. Real Sociedad in the 2026 Copa del Rey final for free.

item.title: Rachat de SFR : faut-il craindre une hausse des prix des abonnements ?
item.description: Les forfaits mobiles ont déjà bondi de 31 % en un an en France. Si le démantèlement de SFR se confirme, la fin de la guerre des prix pourrait être actée.

item.title: Dyson’s handheld fan is more powerful and louder than I expected
item.description: Two years ago I attended a picturesque outdoor wedding in August where the hot and humid weather had guests occasionally ducking into their cars to enjoy a blast of AC. Dyson’s new $99.99 handheld fan would have provided some much-needed relief then, although I’m not sure I would have been comfortable powering it up during […]

item.title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why
item.description: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.

item.title: DJI Avata 360 vs Antigravity A1: I compared the world's first 360 camera drones, and there was one clear winner
item.description: There are now two 360 drones available to buy, but is the DJI Avata 360 or the Antigravity A1 the better of these flying panoramic cameras?
